page_content:
Prerequisite: MATH240, MATH241 and MATH246; or permission of instructor.

Jointly offered with: AOSC663.

Credit Only Granted for: AOSC463 or AOSC663.

Additional Information: This course is offered through a joint effort

of the Earth System Science Interdisciplinary Center (ESSIC, part of UMDb Sciences) and the Joint Global Change Research Institute (a collaboration between UMD and the US Dept of Energyb Northwest National Laboratory).
